safe_pattern: Install a third-party package once; import it in every fresh session
common_error: Assuming an installed package is already loaded
check: Restart the kernel and rerun imports first

safe_pattern: Use os.getcwd(), os.listdir(), and explicit file paths before read_csv
common_error: FileNotFoundError from reading a file outside the CWD
check: Print Path.cwd() and confirm the file appears

safe_pattern: import pandas as pd; import numpy as np
common_error: Using an alias before importing it
check: Run the import cell after every kernel restart

common_error: from package import * hides where names came from
check: Prefer qualified names in notebooks and projects
Use from B import A order
